title: Smiler.
content:
He smiles throughout the morning,
        And all the afternoon;
    He smiles whene'er the sun shines,
        And also at the moon.

    He smiles upon the carpet,
        Or when you pick him up;
    He smiles all through his dinner,
        And when he goes to sup.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Richard Hunter delivers a powerful performance in "Smiler."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
